<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns similar homes response"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/SimilarHomes/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Compares a customer's energy usage with similar homes in the area.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"startDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Start date of the comparison interval","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"endDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"End date of the comparison interval","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"granularity","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Granularity type for the comparison","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns similar homes comparison.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"startDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"endDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-06-01T00:00:00"},"granularity":{"type":"string","example":"month"},"similarHomes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"totalUsage":{"type":"number","example":850.5},"date":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-15T00:00:00"},"alwaysOn":{"type":"number","example":120},"electricVehicle":{"type":"number","example":50},"refrigeration":{"type":"number","example":45},"laundry":{"type":"number","example":35},"cooking":{"type":"number","example":40},"lighting":{"type":"number","example":60},"entertainment":{"type":"number","example":80},"heatingCooling":{"type":"number","example":300},"waterHeating":{"type":"number","example":70.5},"poolSauna":{"type":"number","example":0},"everythingElse":{"type":"number","example":50}},"title":"SimilarHomeData"}}},"title":"SimilarHomesResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
